\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4534 introduces Opera Omnia Vol Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \JacobianOp = \nabla \otimes \FlowVec \Big|_{\StagnationP} \implies \det(\JacobianOp) \to 0 \end{equation}
